Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $35,193,167Details
International Box Office $42,400,000
Worldwide Box Office $77,593,167

DVD Sales (estimated) $28,458,299
Total $28,458,299

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$14,602,867 (41.5% of total gross)
Legs:2.41 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:45.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$32,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,759 opening theaters/2,759 max. theaters, 3.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $61,178,821

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 23rd, 2007 (Wide) by New Line
Video Release: July 24th, 2007 by New Line Home Video, released as Number 23, The
MPA Rating: R for violence, disturbing images, sexuality and language
Running Time: 95 minutes
Plot point: Crime, Mental Illness, Nightmare, Suicide, Surprise Twist, Writing and Writers, Young Child Dealing with the Death of a Parent
Social setting: Film Noir
Subgenre: Crime Thriller
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Contrafilm, Firm Films
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
